parts.label: Intake Manifold
parts.function: Distributes filtered air from the throttle body through twin bridge tubes into both cylinder banks.

parts.label: Throttle Body
parts.function: Regulates the volume of air entering the intake plenum based on driver throttle demand.

parts.label: MAF Sensor / Air Intake
parts.function: Measures the mass of incoming air in the intake snorkel so the ECU can meter fuel.

parts.label: Air-Oil Separator (AOS)
parts.function: Separates oil mist from crankcase blow-by gases and returns clean vapor to the intake.

parts.label: Intake Camshafts
parts.function: Open and close the intake valves in time with the crankshaft via cam lobes.

parts.label: Exhaust Camshafts
parts.function: Open and close the exhaust valves in time with the crankshaft via cam lobes.

parts.label: Timing Chain & Tensioner
parts.function: Links the crankshaft to the camshafts to keep valve timing in sync; the tensioner holds chain tension.

parts.label: Crankshaft
parts.function: Converts the reciprocating motion of the pistons into rotational output torque.

parts.label: Pistons & Rods
parts.function: Compress the air-fuel mixture and transmit combustion force, via the connecting rods, to the crankshaft.

parts.label: Crank Pulley / Vibration Damper
parts.function: Drives the serpentine belt and damps torsional vibration of the crankshaft.

parts.label: Fuel Rail & Injectors
parts.function: Distributes pressurized fuel to the six injectors, which spray metered fuel into each cylinder.

parts.label: Ignition Coil Packs (x6)
parts.function: Step up battery voltage to fire each spark plug at the correct instant.

parts.label: Spark Plugs (x6)
parts.function: Ignite the compressed air-fuel mixture in each combustion chamber.

parts.label: Alternator
parts.function: Generates electrical power and charges the battery while the engine runs.

parts.label: A/C Compressor
parts.function: Pressurizes refrigerant to drive the air-conditioning cooling cycle.

parts.label: Water Pump
parts.function: Circulates coolant between the engine and radiators to regulate temperature.

parts.label: Serpentine Belt & Pulleys
parts.function: Transfers crank rotation to the alternator, A/C compressor and water pump; tensioner and idler pulleys guide it.

parts.label: Oil Filter Housing
parts.function: Holds the cartridge oil filter that removes contaminants from circulating oil.

parts.label: Oil Pump
parts.function: Pressurizes and circulates oil through the engine's lubrication galleries.

parts.label: Thermostat Housing
parts.function: Houses the thermostat that regulates coolant flow so the engine reaches operating temperature.

parts.label: Cylinder Head (Left Bank)
parts.function: Caps the left bank cylinders, carrying the valves and combustion chambers.

parts.label: Cylinder Head (Right Bank)
parts.function: Caps the right bank cylinders, carrying the valves and combustion chambers.

parts.label: Crankcase
parts.function: The split-case aluminum block housing the crankshaft, bores and main bearings.

parts.label: Sump / Oil Pan
parts.function: Reservoir at the bottom of the engine that collects and holds the oil supply.

parts.label: Starter Motor
parts.function: Cranks the engine over against the flywheel ring gear to start it.

parts.label: Cam Cover (Left Bank)
parts.function: Seals the top of the left cylinder head over the camshafts and retains oil in the valvetrain.

parts.label: Cam Cover (Right Bank)
parts.function: Seals the top of the right cylinder head over the camshafts and retains oil in the valvetrain.

parts.label: VarioCam Actuators
parts.function: Oil-pressure solenoids that advance and retard intake cam timing for VarioCam variable valve timing.

parts.label: Timing Chain Tensioner
parts.function: Hydraulic plunger and shoe that takes up slack in the timing chain to keep cam/crank timing exact.

parts.label: Crankshaft Sprocket
parts.function: Toothed gear on the crankshaft nose that drives the timing chain.

parts.label: Flywheel & Ring Gear
parts.function: Stores rotational inertia at the crank rear and carries the ring gear the starter engages.

parts.label: Connecting Rods
parts.function: Link each piston to its crankpin, transmitting combustion force to the crankshaft.

parts.label: Fuel Injectors (x6)
parts.function: Spray finely atomized, metered fuel directly into each combustion chamber for DFI.

parts.label: Alternator Pulley
parts.function: Belt-driven pulley with one-way clutch that spins the alternator rotor.

parts.label: Belt Tensioner Pulley
parts.function: Spring-loaded pulley that keeps the serpentine belt under constant tension.

parts.label: Idler Pulley
parts.function: Smooth pulley that routes and guides the serpentine belt around the accessory drive.

parts.label: Oil Filler Neck & Cap
parts.function: Capped tube where fresh engine oil is poured into the crankcase.

parts.label: Oil Pickup Tube & Strainer
parts.function: Draws oil from the sump through a strainer screen into the oil pump.

parts.label: Engine Mount (Left)
parts.function: Hydraulic mount that supports the left side of the engine and isolates vibration from the chassis.

parts.label: Engine Mount (Right)
parts.function: Hydraulic mount that supports the right side of the engine and isolates vibration from the chassis.

parts.label: Bellhousing
parts.function: Bolts to the rear of the crankcase and mates the engine to the transaxle, enclosing the flywheel.

parts.label: Dipstick Tube
parts.function: Guides the oil-level dipstick down into the sump for checking the oil level.

parts.label: Engine Block (Aluminum Alloy, Flat-Six)
parts.function: Horizontally opposed aluminum alloy block with two cylinder banks and Nikasil-lined bores that forms the structural core of the MA1 engine.

parts.label: Crankshaft (Forged Steel)
parts.function: Forged steel crankshaft with seven main bearings that converts piston reciprocation into rotational torque.

parts.label: Connecting Rods x6 (Forged H-Beam)
parts.function: Forged steel H-beam connecting rods that transmit combustion force from each piston to the crankshaft.

parts.label: Pistons x6 with Piston Rings
parts.function: Bowl-crown pistons designed for DFI spray pattern, sealing combustion gases and transferring force to the connecting rods.

parts.label: Main Bearing Caps
parts.function: Structural caps that clamp the six main bearing journals to retain the crankshaft within the block.

parts.label: Oil Pickup Tube and Oil Strainer
parts.function: Submerged tube and mesh strainer that draws oil from the wet sump into the oil pump.

parts.label: Oil Pan / Sump (Lower Crankcase)
parts.function: Aluminum lower crankcase sump holding 8.75 L of engine oil and sealed by a drain plug boss.

parts.label: Intermediate Shaft (IMS)
parts.function: Shaft inside the block that relays crankshaft drive to both secondary camshaft chains; its bearing is a known service point.

parts.label: Flywheel / PDK Flex Plate Adapter
parts.function: Flex plate bolted to the crankshaft rear that connects to the PDK dual-clutch assembly in place of a conventional flywheel.

parts.label: Cylinder Head Bank 1 (Driver Side)
parts.function: DOHC aluminum cylinder head for the driver-side bank, housing four valves per cylinder and the combustion chambers.

parts.label: Cylinder Head Bank 2 (Passenger Side)
parts.function: Mirror DOHC aluminum cylinder head for the passenger-side bank, housing four valves per cylinder.

parts.label: Intake Camshaft Bank 1
parts.function: VarioCam Plus intake camshaft for Bank 1 providing variable timing and two-stage valve lift.

parts.label: Exhaust Camshaft Bank 1
parts.function: VarioCam Plus exhaust camshaft for Bank 1 providing variable valve timing on the exhaust side.

parts.label: Intake Camshaft Bank 2
parts.function: VarioCam Plus intake camshaft for Bank 2, same specification as Bank 1.

parts.label: Exhaust Camshaft Bank 2
parts.function: VarioCam Plus exhaust camshaft for Bank 2, same specification as Bank 1.

parts.label: Intake Valves x12
parts.function: Sodium-filled intake valves that open to admit the air-fuel charge into each combustion chamber while dissipating heat.

parts.label: Exhaust Valves x12
parts.function: Exhaust valves that open to expel combustion gases from each cylinder after the power stroke.

parts.label: Hydraulic Valve Lifters / Tappets x24
parts.function: Bucket-type hydraulic tappets positioned under each cam lobe that automatically maintain zero valve clearance.

parts.label: Valve Springs x24
parts.function: Coil springs that return each valve to its closed seat after the cam lobe passes.

parts.label: Camshaft Bearing Caps
parts.function: Precision caps that clamp the camshaft journals in the cylinder head to retain the cams in position.

parts.label: Cylinder Head Gaskets x2 (MLS)
parts.function: Multi-layer steel head gaskets that seal combustion pressure and coolant passages between each cylinder head and the block.

parts.label: VarioCam Solenoid Bank 1 Intake
parts.function: Electrohydraulic solenoid that controls oil flow to the Bank 1 intake cam phaser for variable timing adjustment.

parts.label: VarioCam Solenoid Bank 1 Exhaust
parts.function: Electrohydraulic solenoid that controls oil flow to the Bank 1 exhaust cam phaser for variable timing.

parts.label: VarioCam Solenoid Bank 2 Intake
parts.function: Electrohydraulic solenoid for Bank 2 intake cam phasing; susceptible to contamination faults (P0000C area).

parts.label: VarioCam Solenoid Bank 2 Exhaust
parts.function: Electrohydraulic solenoid that controls oil flow to the Bank 2 exhaust cam phaser for variable timing.

parts.label: Camshaft Position Sensors x4
parts.function: Hall-effect sensors, one per camshaft, that report cam phase angle to the DME for closed-loop VarioCam control.

parts.label: Cam Phasers / VVT Actuators x4
parts.function: Vane-type hydraulic phasers bolted to each cam nose that rotate the camshaft relative to the drive sprocket.

parts.label: VarioCam Plus Lift Actuators x12
parts.function: Two-stage lift switching pins, one per cylinder per bank, that engage a second cam lobe profile for high-lift operation.

parts.label: Primary Timing Chain (Crank to IMS)
parts.function: Double-row primary chain that transfers drive from the crankshaft sprocket to the intermediate shaft.

parts.label: Secondary Timing Chains x2 (IMS to Cams)
parts.function: One chain per bank driven from the IMS that drives all four camshafts for precise valve timing.

parts.label: Chain Tensioners x3
parts.function: Hydraulic self-adjusting tensioners that maintain correct tension in the primary and secondary timing chains.

parts.label: Chain Guides and Tensioner Rails
parts.function: Plastic guide rails that support and direct the timing chains to prevent vibration and wear.

parts.label: Timing Chain Covers x2
parts.function: Aluminum covers, one per bank, that enclose the secondary timing chain assemblies and retain oil.

parts.label: Crankshaft Position Sensor (CKP)
parts.function: Reads the 60-2 tooth tone wheel on the crankshaft to provide engine speed and crank angle data to the DME.

parts.label: Oil Pump (High-Pressure Gear Pump)
parts.function: Crankshaft-driven gear pump that generates high oil pressure to supply all engine lubrication galleries.

parts.label: Oil Filter Housing with Pressure Relief
parts.function: Spin-on cartridge filter housing with an integrated pressure relief valve to protect the lubrication circuit.

parts.label: Oil Pressure Sensor
parts.function: Sender that monitors engine oil pressure and signals a warning if pressure falls below the safe threshold.

parts.label: Oil Galleries (Internal Block Passages)
parts.function: Network of internal passages cast into the block and heads that distribute pressurized oil to bearings, cams, and phasers.

parts.label: Piston Cooling Jets / Squirters x6
parts.function: Oil squirter nozzles in the block galleries that spray engine oil directly onto the underside of each piston crown for thermal management.

parts.label: Oil Filler Cap and Dipstick
parts.function: Sealed filler cap and pull-out dipstick used to add oil and check the engine oil level.

parts.label: Ignition Coils x6 (COP)
parts.function: Coil-on-plug pencil coils that step up battery voltage to the high voltage required to fire each spark plug.

parts.label: Spark Plugs x6 (NGK Iridium)
parts.function: NGK laser iridium spark plugs torqued to 3.0 Nm that initiate combustion in each cylinder.

parts.label: Knock Sensors x2
parts.function: Piezoelectric sensors, one per bank, that detect detonation so the DME can retard ignition timing to protect the engine.

parts.label: DME / ECU (Bosch ME 9.8.1)
parts.function: Bosch ME 9.8.1 engine control unit that manages fuel injection, ignition timing, VarioCam Plus, and drive-by-wire throttle.

parts.label: Throttle Position Sensors (Dual Track)
parts.function: Redundant dual-track TPS sensors integrated in each throttle body that relay throttle plate angle to the DME.

parts.label: Coolant Temperature Sensor (ECT)
parts.function: NTC sensor that monitors engine coolant temperature and enables the DME to adjust fuelling and ignition during warm-up.

parts.label: Accelerator Pedal Position Sensor (APP)
parts.function: Drive-by-wire pedal sensor that sends driver throttle demand to the DME for electronic throttle control.

parts.label: Engine Wiring Harness
parts.function: Main engine loom that interconnects all sensors, actuators, injectors, coils, and solenoids with the DME.

parts.label: Air Filter Element
parts.function: Replaceable paper/foam filter element inside the airbox that traps dust and debris before air enters the engine.

parts.label: Air Filter Housing
parts.function: Plastic airbox that holds the air filter element and channels filtered air to the throttle body.

parts.label: High-Pressure Fuel Pump (DFI)
parts.function: Cam-driven high-pressure pump that pressurizes fuel to 150+ bar for direct fuel injection into the combustion chambers.

parts.label: Oil Sump Upper Part (Internal Baffle)
parts.function: Upper sump section with baffles that prevents oil starvation during high-g cornering in the mid-engine layout.

parts.label: Oil Sump Gasket
parts.function: Formed gasket that seals the oil sump to the crankcase to prevent oil leaks at the sump flange.

parts.label: Oil Filter Insert (Cartridge)
parts.function: Replaceable cartridge filter element that removes metallic and carbon contaminants from the engine oil circuit.

parts.label: Crankshaft Main Bearings
parts.function: Plain shell bearings that support the crankshaft main journals inside the crankcase under full oil-film lubrication.

parts.label: Connecting Rod Bearing Shells
parts.function: Tri-metal shell bearings at the big-end of each connecting rod that ride on the crankshaft rod journals.

parts.label: Piston Ring Sets x6
parts.function: Compression and oil-control rings that seal combustion pressure above each piston and scrape excess oil from the bore walls.

parts.label: Crankshaft Oil Seals (Front & Rear)
parts.function: Radial shaft seals at the front and rear of the crankshaft that prevent oil leaking out of the crankcase.

parts.label: Oil-to-Water Heat Exchanger
parts.function: Engine-mounted oil cooler that transfers heat between engine oil and coolant to maintain optimal oil temperature.

parts.label: Valve Stem Seals x24
parts.function: Rubber seals fitted to each valve guide that prevent engine oil from being drawn down the valve stems into the combustion chamber.

parts.label: Cam Sprockets x4
parts.function: Toothed sprockets at each camshaft nose that receive drive from the secondary timing chains.

parts.label: Crankcase Oil Separator
parts.function: Secondary cyclonic oil separator mounted on the crankcase that scavenges oil mist from blow-by gases before they re-enter the intake.
